provable_true_post.solution:
Theorem provable_true_post : forall c P,
    derivable P c True.
Proof.
  induction c; intros P.
  - (* skip *)
    eapply H_Consequence_pre.
    + apply H_Skip.
    + intros st _. reflexivity.
  - (* asgn *)
    eapply H_Consequence_pre.
    + apply H_Asgn.
    + intros st _. unfold assertion_sub. reflexivity.
  - (* seq *)
    eapply H_Seq.
    + apply IHc1.
    + apply IHc2.
  - (* if *)
    apply H_If.
    + apply IHc1.
    + apply IHc2.
  - (* while *)
    eapply H_Consequence_post.
    + apply H_While. apply IHc.
    + intros st [_ _]. reflexivity.
Qed.
provable_true_post.explanation: By induction on c. True as postcondition is trivially satisfiable. For while, any invariant works since the postcondition is True.

provable_false_pre.solution:
Theorem provable_false_pre : forall c Q,
    derivable False c Q.
Proof.
  induction c; intros Q.
  - (* skip *)
    eapply H_Consequence_pre.
    + apply H_Skip.
    + intros st H. inversion H.
  - (* asgn *)
    eapply H_Consequence_pre.
    + apply H_Asgn.
    + intros st H. inversion H.
  - (* seq *)
    eapply H_Seq.
    + apply IHc1.
    + eapply H_Consequence_pre.
      * apply IHc2.
      * intros st _. exact I.
  - (* if *)
    apply H_If.
    + eapply H_Consequence_pre.
      * apply IHc1.
      * intros st [H _]. inversion H.
    + eapply H_Consequence_pre.
      * apply IHc2.
      * intros st [H _]. inversion H.
  - (* while *)
    eapply H_Consequence_post.
    + apply H_While.
      eapply H_Consequence_pre.
      * apply IHc.
      * intros st [H _]. inversion H.
    + intros st [H _]. inversion H.
Qed.
provable_false_pre.explanation: By induction on c. False as precondition makes all obligations vacuously true since we can never have False as a hypothesis.

hoare_sound.solution:
Theorem hoare_sound : forall P c Q,
  derivable P c Q -> valid P c Q.
Proof.
  intros P c Q H. induction H.
  - apply hoare_skip.
  - apply hoare_asgn.
  - eapply hoare_seq; eassumption.
  - apply hoare_if; assumption.
  - apply hoare_while. assumption.
  - eapply hoare_consequence_pre; eassumption.
  - eapply hoare_consequence_post; eassumption.
Qed.
hoare_sound.explanation: By induction on the derivation. Each constructor of derivable corresponds to a proven Hoare logic theorem.

wp_seq.solution:
Lemma wp_seq : forall P Q c1 c2,
    derivable P c1 (wp c2 Q) -> derivable (wp c2 Q) c2 Q -> derivable P <{c1; c2}> Q.
Proof.
  intros P Q c1 c2 H1 H2.
  eapply H_Seq; eassumption.
Qed.
wp_seq.explanation: Simply apply the sequencing rule with wp c2 Q as the intermediate assertion.

wp_invariant.solution:
Lemma wp_invariant : forall b c Q,
    valid ({{$(wp <{while b do c end}> Q) /\ b}}) c (wp <{while b do c end}> Q).
Proof.
  intros b c Q st st' Hc [Hwp Hb].
  unfold wp in *. intros s' Hwhile.
  apply Hwp. eapply E_WhileTrue; eassumption.
Qed.
wp_invariant.explanation: If the wp holds before the body and b is true, after executing the body we can still complete the while loop, so wp is preserved.

hoare_complete.solution:
Theorem hoare_complete: forall P c Q,
  valid P c Q -> derivable P c Q.
Proof.
  unfold valid. intros P c. generalize dependent P.
  induction c; intros P Q HT.
  - (* skip *)
    eapply H_Consequence_pre.
    + apply H_Skip.
    + intros st HP. apply (HT st st). apply E_Skip. assumption.
  - (* asgn *)
    eapply H_Consequence_pre.
    + apply H_Asgn.
    + intros st HP. unfold assertion_sub.
      apply (HT st (x !-> aeval st a ; st)).
      apply E_Asgn. reflexivity. assumption.
  - (* seq *)
    apply wp_seq.
    + apply IHc1. intros st st' Hc1 HP.
      unfold wp. intros s' Hc2.
      apply (HT st s'). eapply E_Seq; eassumption. assumption.
    + apply IHc2. apply wp_is_precondition.
  - (* if *)
    apply H_If.
    + apply IHc1. intros st st' Hc1 [HP Hb].
      apply (HT st st'). apply E_IfTrue; assumption. assumption.
    + apply IHc2. intros st st' Hc2 [HP Hb].
      apply (HT st st'). apply E_IfFalse.
      * unfold bassertion in Hb. destruct (beval st b); try reflexivity. exfalso. apply Hb. reflexivity.
      * assumption.
      * assumption.
  - (* while *)
    eapply H_Consequence.
    + apply H_While.
      apply IHc. apply wp_invariant.
    + intros st HP. unfold wp. intros s' Hwhile. apply (HT st s'); assumption.
    + intros st [Hwp Hb]. unfold wp in Hwp.
      apply Hwp. apply E_WhileFalse.
      unfold bassertion in Hb. destruct (beval st b); try reflexivity. exfalso. apply Hb. reflexivity.
Qed.
hoare_complete.explanation: By induction on c. Use wp as the intermediate assertion for seq and as the loop invariant for while. Each case constructs the appropriate derivation using the IH.
